title: viola obtusa var. tsuifengensis
intro: Viola obtusa var. tsuifengensis, a variety of the Viola obtusa plant, is a type of flowering plant in the pansy family (Violaceae), native to Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Viola obtusa var. tsuifengensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
